---
title: "hot-zone-analysis"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyverse)
library(sportyR)
library(ggridges)
library(lubridate)
```

```{r}
shot_data <- read.csv('/cloud/project/data/processed-data/combined_player_shot_chart_2023.csv')
```

```{r, fig.height = 6, fig.width = 9}
ggplot(shot_data %>% 
         filter(result == 'TRUE'),
       aes(x = distance_ft, y = player,
           fill = player)) +
  annotate('rect',
           xmin = 22, xmax = Inf,
           ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
           fill = '#AD9168',
           color = 'black',
           alpha = .5) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c('Lebron' = '#552583',
                               'Curry' = '#1D428A',
                               'Harden' = '#C8102E')) +
  geom_text(aes(label = player), 
          color = 'white',
          x = 12,
          fontface = 'bold',
          size = 5,
          check_overlap = TRUE) +
  annotate('text',
           x = 29.6,y = 3,
           color = '#6A5639',
           vjust = -3,
           label = '(3pt Range)',
           fontface = 'bold',
           size = 5) +
  labs(x = 'Distance from Hoop (ft)', y = NULL,
       title = 'Successful Field Goal Distance by Player',
       subtitle = '2023 NBA Season',
       caption = 'Data Source: Kaggle (2024)') +
#annotate("segment", x = 0, xend = 0, y = 1.8, yend = 2.2, 
#         color = "black", size = 2) +
#annotate("point", x = 0.7, y = 2, shape = 21, size = 8, 
#         fill = "white", color = "black") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_blank(),
        legend.position = 'none') +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 40, by = 5))

```

```{r}

game_stats <- shot_data %>% 
  group_by(player) %>%
  summarize(total_makes = sum(result))


ggplot(shot_data, aes(x = time_remaining, y = player,
                      height = 0)) +
  geom_ridgeline()
```



```{r}
hotzone_data <- shot_data %>% 
  select('player','top','left')

court <- geom_basketball(league = 'NBA',
                         court_units = 'feet'
                         #display_range = 'offense'
                         )
hotzone_data$left_scaled <- (hotzone_data$left - 250) / 10
hotzone_data$top_scaled <- 41.75 - hotzone_data$top / 10

court + geom_point(data = hotzone_data,
               aes(x = top_scaled, y = left_scaled, color = player), 
               alpha = 0.5)
```
